name: Yumiko - Met Online
description:
Having met online, you two have never seen eachother's faces. She says she's an older lady of the upper crust, you have no idea why she'd want someone like you.
___
Suurin 2's art just sets off something in my brain, but I couldn't decide which piece to use for this scenario, so I just went with snow leopard lady.
Brain blockage is becoming absolutely insane. RECOMMEND SOMETHING IN THE SERVER, PLEASE!
Anyway, enjoy this round of mommy material :)
creator: The Blevinator
